name: retail_analytics_v1
description: Retail store with inventory, promotions, and POS data
create_sql:
-- Schema: retail_analytics_v1 (Retail store with inventory, promotions, and POS data)

CREATE TABLE stores (
  store_id INT PK,
  city VARCHAR,
  state VARCHAR,
  opened_date DATE,
  sq_footage INT,
  manager_id INT
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  product_id INT PK,
  sku VARCHAR,
  name VARCHAR,
  brand VARCHAR,
  category VARCHAR,
  cost_price DECIMAL(8,2),
  retail_price DECIMAL(8,2)
);

CREATE TABLE inventory (
  inv_id INT PK,
  store_id INT FK(stores),
  product_id INT FK(products),
  quantity INT,
  reorder_level INT,
  last_restocked DATE
);

CREATE TABLE promotions (
  promo_id INT PK,
  name VARCHAR,
  discount_pct DECIMAL(4,2),
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  promo_type VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE transactions (
  txn_id INT PK,
  store_id INT FK(stores),
  product_id INT FK(products),
  promo_id INT FK(promotions),
  quantity INT,
  sale_price DECIMAL(8,2),
  txn_timestamp TIMESTAMP
);
